Quarter: The specific quarter and year when the internal system backup checks were completed
Cybersecurity_Specialist: The cybersecurity specialist responsible for completing the internal system backup checks
Company: The company for which the internal system backup checks were performed
Platform: The specific platform for which the internal system backup checks were performed
Backup_Checks_Completed: The number of internal system backup checks completed in the specified quarter
Date_Range: The specific date range within the specified quarter when the internal system backup checks were completed
